message:
refactor(tests): convert remaining test functions to Result pattern

Continue the refactoring from a9df3ad to convert test functions
to return Result<(), String> instead of using assert! with implicit
panics. This provides better error diagnostics on failure.

Updated files:
- tests/unit/config_tests.rs
- tests/unit/hash_embed_tests.rs
- tests/unit/skill_spec_tests.rs
- tests/e2e/fresh_install.rs
- tests/e2e/layer_conflict.rs
- tests/e2e/skill_creation.rs
- src/test_utils/mod.rs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
